articles.value: Build a Punisher Deck with Combustion Man
articles.excerpt: Let's take Combustion Man, from Avatar: The Last Airbender, and turn him into a Punisher commander with plenty of underplayed cards.
Who deserves to wear the crown?
Can Hazoret's downsides be turned into a benefit?

articles.value: Will War of the Spark Make "Oops, All Planeswalkers" Viable in All Colors?
articles.excerpt: Will the new War of the Spark planeswalkers make all-planeswalker decks possible?
